evals.prompt: i remember figuring out something about pg-boss and worker queues like two weeks ago but i can't find it anywhere — can you dig through my claude history?
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger. Scan ~/.claude/projects/*/*.jsonl filtered to ~last 2-3 weeks by mtime. Check manifest.json to skip already-harvested. Extract Reference/Decision items. Write to pending.md with session source tags. Update manifest. Report counts.

evals.prompt: harvest my last 7 days of sessions and stage them for review
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger explicitly. Filter by mtime (7 days). Run full workflow. Produce pending.md. Do NOT commit downstream — user runs their own /<ns>:commit-sessions command for that.

evals.prompt: wait, what did you just say a minute ago about the error boundary pattern? i want to make sure i understood correctly.
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger. This is a current-session question — use scrollback/context, not the harvester. The harvester only reads completed sessions on disk; 'a minute ago' is the current conversation.
